title: Giving Mom a Break: The Impact of Higher EITC Payments on Maternal Health
notes: Stata: reg excel_vgood dd_treatment twoplus_kids eitc_expand if educ<=2, cluster(fips). Individual BRFSS survey data. Treatment = EITC expansion interacted with 2+ kids. Single adoption 1995. TWFE fix (Round 3): Stata uses plain OLS with NO unit/time FEs (treatment dd_treatment already encodes DiD variation). Template incorrectly added fips+year FEs giving 0.01032 vs Stata 0.00948. Fix: feols(excel_vgood ~ dd_treatment + twoplus_kids + eitc_expand, cluster=~fips) without | FE spec → 0.009483 (exact match). EVENT STUDY NOT IMPLEMENTED: treatment is defined at the individual level (kids > 1), not at the unit_id (fips) level.
